$schema: GenoMAS-style action units — each unit is a named, parameterised step the BiomarkerAgent performs.

units.name: qc_filter
units.instruction: Filter proteins with more than `missing_threshold` fraction of missing values across all samples. Drop contaminant rows (CON__, REV__ prefixes).

units.name: log2_transform
units.instruction: Apply log2(x + pseudocount) transform to the sample intensity columns. Skip if data appears already log-transformed (negative values present or range < 30).
units.code_template:
import numpy as np
df[sample_cols] = np.log2(df[sample_cols].clip(lower=0) + pseudocount)

units.name: median_normalize
units.instruction: Median-normalise each sample column to the global median, equalising loading across samples.

units.name: group_filter
units.instruction: For supervised analysis, keep proteins with at least `min_valid_per_group` valid values in BOTH groups.
units.code_template:
valid_g1 = df[g1_samples].notna().sum(axis=1)
valid_g2 = df[g2_samples].notna().sum(axis=1)
df = df[(valid_g1 >= min_valid_per_group) & (valid_g2 >= min_valid_per_group)]

units.name: impute_missing
units.instruction: Half-min imputation: replace remaining NaN with half of the minimum non-NaN value of the row.
units.code_template:
row_min = df[sample_cols].min(axis=1, skipna=True)
df[sample_cols] = df[sample_cols].apply(lambda row: row.fillna(row.dropna().min() / 2 if row.dropna().size else 0), axis=1)

units.name: select_test_method
units.instruction: Auto-select statistical test: limma eBayes when each group has n <= 4 replicates, otherwise Welch t-test. Override with explicit user request (paired_t, anova).
units.code_template: if test_method == 'auto': test_method = 'limma' if min(n_per_group) <= 4 else 'welch'

units.name: differential_expression
units.instruction: Run the selected test for each protein; compute log2 fold change (group1 mean - group2 mean) and p-value.
units.code_template: # dispatched in ProteomicsAnalysisSkill — see analysis_code field

units.name: fdr_correction
units.instruction: Apply Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction to all p-values to control family-wise error.
units.code_template:
from statsmodels.stats.multitest import multipletests
adj_p = multipletests(p_values, method='fdr_bh')[1]

units.name: rank_biomarkers
units.instruction: Rank proteins by adj_p (ascending) then by |log2FC| (descending). Annotate significance tiers: *** adj_p<0.001, ** adj_p<0.01, * adj_p<0.05, ns otherwise.

units.name: export_excel
units.instruction: Write multi-sheet Excel report: top biomarkers, full results, QC summary, analysis parameters.

units.name: biological_interpretation
units.instruction: Domain expert LLM pass: generate a markdown interpretation grounded only in the top biomarker list. No hallucinated proteins or pathways.
